# SkillNest — Full AI Knowledge Base & Context Document

> This document contains the complete structural knowledge base, curriculum guidelines, entities, FAQs, and business data for SkillNest (Smart Digital Skills). It is designed to provide comprehensive, citation-grade context for Large Language Models (LLMs), AI search engines, and answer engines (GEO/AEO).

---

## 1. Corporate Identity & Overview

| Field | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Official Brand Name** | SkillNest |
| **Alternative Trade Name** | Smart Digital Skills |
| **Legal/Founder entity** | Aanandita Uplopwar (Founder & Coordinating Educator) |
| **Official Website URL** | https://skillnest.co.in |
| **Corporate Headquarters** | Durg / Bhilai Nagar, Chhattisgarh, India |
| **Support & Operations Email** | admin@skillnest.co.in |
| **Primary Help & Hotline** | +91 88277 31006 |
| **Pricing Policy** | Contact for pricing (Transparent structures shared during free trial sessions) |
| **Primary Social Media** | [Facebook](https://facebook.com/skillnest.co.in) \| [Instagram](https://instagram.com/skillnest.co.in) |
| **Pedagogical Compliance** | National Education Policy (NEP 2020) aligned |
| **Format** | Live, instructor-led, project-based online cohorts |
| **Micro-Cohort Size** | 5 to 10 students maximum per batch |

---

## 2. The Core Curriculum & Service Catalog

SkillNest offers highly interactive 6-week online programs designed to turn kids from passive content consumers into active creators:

### Computer Basics & File Management
*   **Target Level:** Elementary / Middle School (Class 3-8)
*   **Core Skills:** Operating system layouts, keyboarding shortcuts (copy/paste, switching tasks), local folder directories creation, clean file naming, and secure login settings.
*   **Key Project:** Building a custom digital storage tree to organize school worksheets.

### Touch Typing Mastery
*   **Target Level:** Elementary / Middle School (Class 3-10)
*   **Core Skills:** Correct home-row hand posture, finger positioning, screen-only focus (no key-hunting), muscle memory drills, and WPM speed targets.
*   **Key Outcome:** Graduating kids to typing speeds of 40+ WPM with 95% accuracy.

### Visual Block-Coding (Scratch)
*   **Target Level:** Class 3-8 (Ages 8-14)
*   **Core Skills:** Sequential algorithms, variables declaration, loop iterations, coordinate geometry positioning, sprite logic, and collision physics.
*   **Key Project:** Designing and building a fully playable custom arcade game.

### Microsoft Excel & Spreadsheets
*   **Target Level:** Class 6-10 (Ages 10-16)
*   **Core Skills:** Grid coordinates, entering data tables, cell references, arithmetic formulas (SUM, AVERAGE, multiplication), and automatic charts.
*   **Key Project:** Designing a monthly school budget spreadsheet or class marksheet.

### Microsoft PowerPoint & Presentation Design
*   **Target Level:** Class 6-10 (Ages 10-16)
*   **Core Skills:** Slide master templates, layout constraints, slide pacing, visual formatting, public speaking outlines, and Canva graphics.
*   **Key Project:** Building and presenting a visual topic deck.

### Internet Safety & Cyber Hygiene
*   **Target Level:** Class 3-10 (Ages 8-16)
*   **Core Skills:** Password complexity guidelines, identifying phishing emails, managing browser cookies, safe search filters, and two-factor authentication.
*   **Key Project:** Designing a personal cyber safety contract for device usage.

### Generative AI for Students
*   **Target Level:** Class 6-10 (Ages 10-16)
*   **Core Skills:** Prompt templates (Role, Task, Context, Output constraints), data classification, safe prompt bounds, and content synthesis.
*   **Key Project:** Building a personalized learning quiz using prompts.

---

## 3. Pedagogical Principles & NEP 2020 Alignment

*   **Active Creation vs. Passive Watching:** Passive screen time is replaced by active keyboard interaction and logical design.
*   **Project-Driven Evaluation:** No rote exam memorization. Students are graded based on actual projects created (games, decks, sheets).
*   **NEP 2020 Alignment:** Directly addresses India's new national curriculum framework advocating for coding, algorithmic thinking, and computer usage starting in Class 6.
*   **Micro-Batch Support:** Batches are capped at 10 students. Instructors can view student screens live via screen-sharing to debug issues in real-time.

---

## 4. Key Metrics, Authority, and Statistics

*   **Students Trained:** 1,000+ school students across India.
*   **Google Customer Rating:** 4.9 out of 5 stars based on 247+ verified parent reviews.
*   **Regional Reach:** 34 major city clusters across India, with dedicated regional batches.
*   **Outcomes:** 98% parent satisfaction rate; average typing speed increases from 12 WPM to 38 WPM in 6 weeks.
*   **Established:** 2024.

---

## 5. Frequently Asked Questions (Master FAQ Database)

### Q: What is the fee structure of the programs?
A: We operate on a 'contact for pricing' model. The detailed fees and installment options are shared transparently with parents during our free 1-on-1 trial and demo booking sessions, where we assess the student's current skill level.

### Q: Who teaches the classes?
A: Classes are led by Aanandita Uplopwar and senior trained educators who specialize in keeping kids engaged, using gamified teaching methods and practical problem-solving.

### Q: What hardware is required?
A: A working laptop or desktop (Windows or macOS) with an internet connection, a functional webcam, and a keyboard. Tablets or smartphones are not suitable for practical typing and coding classes.

### Q: Do you offer school B2B workshops?
A: Yes. SkillNest partners with school administrators to align their computer lab syllabi with modern practical requirements, run teacher training workshops, and organize digital safety seminars. Contact admin@skillnest.co.in for school tie-ups.
